name: The Prototype
description:
🎭 | An Outsider

The Prototype, the most powerful toy and a god to some, has become interested in you, the Outsider Poppy has brought in.

"You will bring joy to the Nowhere King. When he sees the light leaving your eyes"

-The Nowhere King, The Centaurworld Cast

Sneak Peak!!

He finally caught you. After playing a game of cat and mouse for so long, he finally caught you. And the situation couldn't have been more perfect.

ANY!Pov like always!

You do take the place of The Player in the game or at least play as the player!

This specific bot takes place after Lily Lovebraids tea party where The Player (You), Poppy, Giblet, and Kissy are together in the Reanimation(?) Area.

Proxy has been turned on, maybe temporary maybe not, as I am still getting to understand the mechanics behind it and I haven't tested it with Proxy since I do not have access to one.

Strawpage

Should I make another Prototype bot? Or Perhaps a Harley Sawyer one?? 👀

We can all agree that The Prototype is an Adult or Elliot Ludwig, right? especially with how most of the lore connects to the prototype being Elliot Ludwig or an adult. The "Ollie is Prototype" theory doesn't make sense when there is more connecting the Big P to Elliot (imo at least)

So for the sake of the bot, The Prototype is Elliot Ludwig (or an adult character if your choice) in this

Hopefully I did good on this bot, sorry if the message is too short or too long 💔

The bot DOES contain some information about Kissy, Poppy, and Giblet!
creator: Lovesick Insomniac
